channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Prep roundup: Graham Schlicht’s pitching gem lifts De La Salle over Dublin
item.description: Granada, Leigh, Clayton Valley, Santa Teresa among baseball winners. In softball, Notre Dame-Belmont, San Ramon Valley, Live Oak, San Leandro prevail.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: Jokic gets a triple-double in his return to lead Nuggets past Bucks 127-117
item.description: Nikola Jokic had 39 points, 10 rebounds and 10 assists in his first game back in nearly two weeks to lead the Denver Nuggets to a 127-117 victory against the Milwaukee Bucks.
item.dc:creator: Craig Meyer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: American figure skater Alysa Liu takes the lead on the opening night of the world championships
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Alysa Liu rarely wavers when it comes to anything, whether it be her abrupt decision to retire after the 2022 Winter Olympics, or the American figure skater's similarly stunning decision to announce her comeback early last year.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James beats buzzer with tip to lift Lakers past Pacers and keep record streak alive
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — LeBron James had a buzzer-beating tip-in to cap a 10-point fourth quarter, Luka Doncic scored 34 points and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Indiana Pacers 120-119 on Wednesday night. James extended his NBA-record streak of 10 or more points to 1,283 games — barely.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: VCU names former Bryant head basketball coach Phil Martelli Jr. the next Rams head coach
item.description: Phil Martelli Jr. has been named the 14th head coach of VCU Men’s Basketball team, which was officially announced by Athletics Director Ed McLaughlin on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Nolan Knight, PHL 17

item.title: Grizzlies teammates separated from each other after shove during timeout
item.description: Desmond Bane and Santi Aldama had to be separated from one another after Bane pushed Aldama during a stoppage of play on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL competition committee proposes moving touchback to 35 and making dynamic kickoff permanent
item.description: The NFL competition committee is recommending making the dynamic kickoff rule permanent and moving touchbacks to the 35-yard line in hopes of generating even more returns.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: FIFA details Club World Cup prize money with $125M target for the winner in $1BN fund
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — The winner of FIFA’s first 32-team Club World Cup in the United States could earn $125 million as details of a $1 billion prize money fund were finally published Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Xavier hires Richard Pitino as basketball coach
item.description: There will be more than one Pitino in the Big East next season. Xavier hired Richard Pitino, the son of St. John's coach Rick Pitino, as its basketball coach on Tuesday night. The school had an opening after Sean Miller left to accept the Texas job on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes season ends with 76-68 loss to Indiana
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's basketball team's fourth consecutive trip to the NCAA Tournament was a short one. Yarden Garzon scored 17 points and Shay Ciezki added 16 as No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Guenther scores go-ahead goal in 3-2 win over Buffalo
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club scored three goals in the third period and defeated the Buffalo Sabres 5-2 at Delta Center on Thursday. Mikhail Sergachev scored twice for Utah (31-27-11), which has won five of its last seven games at home.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies go ice cold in Big Dance loss to UCLA
item.description: LEXINGTON, Kent. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State couldn't have picked a worse time to have the worst offensive game of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Triton fever is spreading across UC San Diego
item.description: Triton fever is spreading across UC San Diego as the campus community is ready to see Michigan go down during Thursday‘s NCAA tournament matchup against the home team.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Alvarez, Fox 5

item.title: Top-ranked Chicago area softball player to represent Puerto Rico at U-15 Pan American Championship
item.description: ROSELLE, Ill. — In the backyard of her Roselle home, Maya Melendez practices her favorite sport on her personal field of dreams. “When you’re a kid playing (sports), it’s basketball in the street, so what kid wouldn’t want to have their own field in their yard?” Maya’s dad, Randy Smith, figured.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9
